title: Norwegian Cheese Gratin
description: A rich and creamy gratin made with Norwegian cheese, perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly pour in the cold water, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the cheese until melted and smooth.
Pour the cheese mixture into the prepared gratin dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is hot and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
